channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CJP leader begins hunger strike over protest site removal and demands PM resignation
item.description: Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, has begun an indefinite hunger strike after activist Sonam Wangchuk was removed from the Jantar Mantar protest site. The decision was announced on...

item.title: Government Clarifies There Is No Open NYOTA Phase Two Business Support Application
item.description: The Kenyan government has cautioned members of the public against a fake online advert claiming that applications for Phase Two of the National Youth Opportunities Towards Advancement (NYOTA) Project ...

item.title: Opposition Leaders Arrive in Taita Taveta Amid Public Concerns Over Plane Travel
item.description: Babu Owino and James Orengo arrived in Taita Taveta on Saturday via a private plane for the Linda Mwananchi rally, sparking mixed reactions. The video of their arrival on a remote airstrip went viral,...

item.title: Israel's ambassador criticizes backlash over Calgary Stampede photo involving Naheed Nenshi
item.description: Israel's ambassador to Canada, Iddo Moed, criticized what he described as hatred entering a space meant for hospitality after Alberta NDP Leader Naheed Nenshi apologized for appearing in a photo with ...

item.title: Global Uncertainty and Market Volatility: China's Economy, Middle East Conflict, and SpaceX's Stock Decline
item.description: Australian investors faced heightened uncertainty as global events shaped market dynamics. A slowing Chinese economy, with GDP growth easing to 4.3% in the latest quarter, raised concerns for Australi...

item.title: Tragic death of rugby fan highlights safety concerns at Tshwane construction site
item.description: The death of 51-year-old rugby fan Hugo van de Berg after falling into an excavation near Loftus Versfeld has sparked intense scrutiny over safety measures at a Tshwane construction site. The incident...

item.title: President Samia Launches Tabora-Kigoma SGR Project
item.description: President Samia has officially launched the Tabora-Kigoma Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) project, a significant infrastructure initiative aimed at enhancing regional connectivity and boosting economic g...

item.title: DSWD provides aid to motorcycle rider killed by passenger
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has extended assistance to the family of Fabio Norberte Jr., a motorcycle taxi rider who was stabbed and killed by his passenger in Caloocan Cit...

item.title: Security forces thwart suicide attack in Wana, kill terrorist
item.description: Security forces in South Waziristan’s Wana successfully foiled a major terrorist plot by destroying an explosive-laden vehicle intended for a suicide attack, according to state media. The operation, b...

item.title: Cultural Intelligence Key for Brands to Win Market Share, Says Adunade
item.description: A growing number of Nigerian brands are spending more on marketing but failing to connect with audiences because their messaging lacks cultural relevance, brand strategist Iyinoluwa Adunade has said. ...

item.title: Australian Startups Compete in Stripe x Startup Battlefield Event
item.description: The article announces the final 48-hour deadline for Australian startups to apply for the Stripe x Startup Battlefield competition, which will culminate in a live pitch event in Sydney on August 19. T...

item.title: M&S redefines retail success with sustainable innovation and customer-centric strategies
item.description: Marks & Spencer (M&S) has transformed its retail strategy by blending sustainability, affordability, and customer engagement to remain competitive in a challenging market. The article highlights the P...

item.title: Tiwa Savage reveals leaked video was part of a bet with ex-boyfriend
item.description: Tiwa Savage has shared new details about the leak of her private video, revealing it was part of a bet involving her ex-boyfriend. The singer described the experience as traumatic, calling herself a v...

item.title: Senator Cayetano criticizes Marcos over rejected P10k aid plan
item.description: Senator Alan Peter Cayetano accused President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. of rejecting a proposed P10,000 aid plan for pandemic-affected Filipinos after his 2022 presidential victory. In a Faceboo...

item.title: Edwardian-era harbourside apartment fails to sell at Sydney auction
item.description: A three-bedroom, two-storey heritage apartment in Elizabeth Bay failed to sell at auction despite its Edwardian-era features and proximity to Rushcutters Bay Park. The property, listed at $2.35 millio...

item.title: CDC investigates Cyclospora outbreak linked to Taco Bell lettuce supply chain
item.description: Federal health officials are investigating whether shredded iceberg lettuce from Taylor Farms in California was the source of a nationwide Cyclospora outbreak affecting over 1,600 people across 34 sta...

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Sparks Widespread Anxiety and Social Media Concerns
item.description: A nationwide outbreak of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection causing explosive diarrhea, has triggered significant anxiety across the U.S., amplified by social media platforms. The Centers for Disea...

item.title: Nile Media Entertainment Group, Idris Elba's 22Summers and Action Xtreme Launch African Action Film Partnership
item.description: Moses Babatope’s Nile Media Entertainment Group, Chee Keong Cheung’s Action Xtreme, and Idris Elba’s 22Summers have formed a strategic partnership to produce action films rooted in West African storie...

item.title: Edmonton Elks secure win with strong defense and Blanchard's field goals
item.description: The Edmonton Elks extended their winning streak with a 19-17 victory over the B.C. Lions, showcasing a dominant defensive performance and reliable kicking from Vincent Blanchard. The game, played at E...

item.title: Fattah's Visit Promotes Tanzania-Egypt Relations and Infrastructure Projects
item.description: The article highlights President Samia Suluhu Hassan's recent visit to Egypt, aimed at strengthening bilateral ties and exploring opportunities for collaboration. During the visit, discussions focused...
